response.justification: While the candidate meets the minimum educational and experience requirements (Bachelor's + 13 years), their entire background is in full-stack software development with no demonstrated expertise in the core competencies required: SoC/IP modeling, hardware architecture, deep learning accelerator optimization, or hardware-software co-design. Recent mention of 'AI-agent infrastructure' refers to LLM frameworks, not hardware optimization. This role requires domain-specific hardware engineering knowledge that is entirely absent from the resume.
strengths: Exceeds minimum experience requirement with 13+ years of professional development and strong architectural background across multiple platforms
Demonstrated performance optimization in software (low-latency systems, caching, concurrent I/O) and ability to work across stack layers from frontend to backend services
Strong communication and teaching skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and open-source projects showing ability to explain complex technical concepts
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture experience; entire career focused on software development rather than hardware-software co-design
Complete absence of deep learning, neural network optimization, or AI accelerator workload expertise mentioned in required qualifications
No demonstrated experience with SIMD/MIMD architecture, GPU optimization, or hardware performance analysis at the instruction/architecture level
